title: AIO_In Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function AIO_In (Channel As Integer) As Single
parameters:
Channel	Specify the channel number of the analog
		 I/O.
description: Reads analog value form optional analog I/O input channel.
see_also:
AIO_InW, AIO_Out, AIO_OutW

AIO_In Example

VB
examples:
Dim val As Single
val = m_spel.AIO_In(2)
